# seerr_notification_email (Data Source)

Read Seerr email notification settings via /api/v1/settings/notifications/email.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `email` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--email))
- `embed_poster` (Boolean)
- `enabled` (Boolean)
- `notification_types` (Set of String)

<a id="nestedatt--email"></a>
### Nested Schema for `email`

Read-Only:

- `allow_self_signed` (Boolean)
- `auth_pass` (String, Sensitive)
- `auth_user` (String)
- `email_from` (String)
- `ignore_tls` (Boolean)
- `pgp_password` (String, Sensitive)
- `pgp_private_key` (String, Sensitive)
- `require_tls` (Boolean)
- `secure` (Boolean)
- `sender_name` (String)
- `smtp_host` (String)
- `smtp_port` (Number)
